calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-22-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Scott Gursky, Esq. for Plaintiff: L.A. Commercial Group, Inc., a Corporation, dba Continenetal Commercial Group.
Plaintiff's Witness: Janie Chow was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Thomas Kenji Romano, ind. and dba Progress Intenational/Ocean Bay Damages $25,846.69
Prejudgment Interest $9,345.75
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $325.50, for a total of $38,342.94
Judgment signed in open court.
